title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0587
summary: Kulwinder Kaur was accused of kidnapping a child along with main accused Sunny and later handing over the child to Kashmir Kaur for a payment of ₹1,50,000. While the FIR identified unknown kidnappers, PW-5 testified that Kulwinder Kaur and Sunny brought the child to her for adoption.
